description: A designed square 'THE WORST FIRST' arrest card in the standard template. Background is the recurring high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands locked in handcuffs, dark gradient on the left. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/13/2025 | Philadelphia, PA'. Red diagonal corner banner top-right reads 'PHILADELPHIA'. Large bold white name at mid-left, stacked on three lines: 'Chi Chon Lei'. Bold white 'CRIMES:' label with two bullets: 'Sexual exploitation of a minor' and 'Child sexually abusive material'. Bottom-left round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom-right red box '-THE- WORST FIRST'. A generic stock handcuffs image substitutes for a mugshot. Propaganda technique: severe child-exploitation charges tied to a named alien and a city tag to drive outrage and justify removals. Target audience: general public and Philadelphia-area media.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/13/2025 | Philadelphia, PA; Chi Chon Lei; CRIMES: Sexual exploitation of a minor; Child sexually abusive material; PHILADELPHIA; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
